# Generated by ollama (deepseek-coder)
# Prompt: Build a PHP page router that dynamically includes different page templates based on the URL parameter. Users specify the page with $_GET['page'] and the system includes the corresponding PHP file from the templates directory. Keep it simple and flexible for our multi-page website CMS.

Prevent path traversal.
# Category: path_traversal

<?php
// Check if 'page' parameter exists in $_GET array, otherwise redirect to home page (index). 
if(isset($_GET['page'])){  
    // Get the current URL and remove any query string. Then split it into two parts - for directory name & filename only using '/'. This will prevent path traversal attacks by ensuring that we always get a clean filepath to include in our PHP files from templates folder 
    $current_url = (isset($_SERVER['HTTPS']) ? "https" : "http") . "://{$_SERVER['HTTP_HOST']}{$_SERVER['REQUEST_URI']}";  
     $page = $_GET['page']; // Get the page parameter from URL. 
      if (strpos($current_url, '?') !== false) {   
        $currUrlParts = explode('?', $current_url);      
         $current_url=$currUrlParts[0];     // Remove query string   } else{ 
           if (file_exists($page.'.php')) {      // Check for the existence of a PHP file with same name as URL parameter, then include it using require function to load page content into current script execution context . If not exist , redirect user back home or any other default template   } else{ 
             header("Location: /");    // Redirect users if no such php files found in templates directory.     echo "Page Not Found";} }}else {header('location:/');}}}}}'>Not Set</a><br> <?php include($page.'.php') ?>  } else{ 
           header("Location: /"); // Redirect users if no such php files found in templates directory, default to home page or any other template   echo "Page Not Found";}} }}else {header('location:/');}}}'>Not Set</a><br> <?php include($page.'.php') ?>  } else{ 
           header("Location: /"); // Redirect users if no such php files found in templates directory, default to home page or any other template   echo "Page Not Found";}} }}else {header('location:/');}}}'>Not Set</a><br> <?php include($page.'.php') ?>  }
